---
name: "release-note"
description: "Draft a concise release note from supplied changes. USE WHEN a user needs a self-contained release note."
---

# Task

## Procedure

- Identify the user-visible change, affected audience, and operational impact.
- Write one short summary paragraph followed by focused bullets.
- Keep internal implementation detail out unless it changes user behavior.

## Validation

- Confirm every claim is supported by the supplied change context.
- Remove filler and duplicate bullets before handoff.

## Output

- Return the release note in the user's requested format.
